CustomField.description:
If selected (Checked), the button will it will ONLY be displayed after a user performs a search and will NOT be displayed from viewing results from the History tab.
If not selected (Unchecked), the custom button will appear all the time.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
If selected (Checked), the button will it will ONLY be displayed after a user performs a search and will NOT be displayed from viewing results from the History tab.
If not selected (Unchecked), the custom button will appear all the time.
CustomField.label: Button Custom1 SearchMode
